bio: Mohammad-Javad Bahonar was a cleric and co-founder of the [Islamic Republican Party](/orgs/islamic-republican-party). He served briefly as prime minister under [President Mohammad-Ali Rajai](/people/mohammad-ali-rajai) in 1981. He and Rajai were assassinated in a bombing at the prime minister's office on 30 August 1981, an attack attributed to the [Mojahedin-e Khalq](/orgs/mojahedin-e-khalq) (MEK). He had previously served as Minister of Education.
